title: SSE buf.drain from front is O(remaining) per frame
description: client.rs subscribe_events: buf.drain(..pos + delim_len) shifts all remaining bytes in the String left after each frame extraction — O(remaining_bytes) per frame. A VecDeque<u8> with a read-cursor, or tracking a byte offset into the buffer and trimming periodically, would make extraction O(1). Impact is bounded by the 1 MiB cap but still wastes cycles for high-volume SSE streams where many frames are back-to-back in the buffer.
